meta.project: Sistema de Gestión Academia de Natación

product_overview: Sistema web interno para administrar una academia de natación desde un panel centralizado. Permite autenticación local y la gestión de estudiantes, instructores, niveles, clases, inscripciones, pagos, asistencias y métricas del dashboard.
core_goals: Permitir acceso seguro mediante autenticación local con token Bearer.
Centralizar la administración operativa de estudiantes, instructores, clases y niveles.
Gestionar inscripciones, pagos y asistencias con validaciones y filtros.
Mostrar estadísticas agregadas del negocio en un dashboard protegido.
Mantener compatibilidad con la base de datos MySQL existente y el rol único de administrador.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Permite iniciar y cerrar sesión con credenciales locales usando Laravel Sanctum y acceder a la información del usuario autenticado.
user_flows: POST /api/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with JWT token and user data -> GET /api/me with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile -> POST /api/logout with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming token revocation
POST /api/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 invalid credentials message
POST /api/login with missing or malformed email/password -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/me without Bearer token -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /api/logout without Bearer token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Muestra contadores agregados para las tarjetas del panel principal después de la autenticación.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/stats with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with estudiantes, instructores, clases, and inscripciones_activas counts
GET /api/dashboard/stats without Bearer token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Permite listar, crear, consultar, actualizar y eliminar estudiantes, incluyendo búsqueda y paginación.
user_flows: GET /api/estudiantes?search=ana&page=1&per_page=10 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of students
POST /api/estudiantes with valid nombre and fecha_nacimiento -> Receive 201 with created student
GET /api/estudiantes/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with student details and inscripciones
PUT /api/estudiantes/{id} with valid updated fields -> Receive 200 with updated student
DELETE /api/estudiantes/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion and cascade cleanup
POST /api/estudiantes with missing required nombre or fecha_nacimiento -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/estudiantes/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found
DELETE /api/estudiantes/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Instructor Management
features.description: Permite administrar instructores con búsqueda, paginación y operaciones CRUD completas.
user_flows: GET /api/instructores?search=carlos&page=1 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of instructors
POST /api/instructores with valid nombre and optional specialty/email -> Receive 201 with created instructor
GET /api/instructores/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with instructor details and clases
PUT /api/instructores/{id} with valid updates -> Receive 200 with updated instructor
DELETE /api/instructores/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/instructores with missing required nombre -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/instructores/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Level Management
features.description: Permite listar, crear, actualizar y eliminar niveles de natación usados en la asignación de clases.
user_flows: GET /api/niveles with Bearer token -> Receive 200 array of levels
POST /api/niveles with unique nombre_nivel -> Receive 201 with created level
PUT /api/niveles/{id} with valid data -> Receive 200 with updated level
DELETE /api/niveles/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/niveles with duplicate nombre_nivel -> Receive 422 validation error
PUT /api/niveles/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found
DELETE /api/niveles/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Permite administrar clases de natación y asociarlas a un nivel, instructor y cupo.
user_flows: GET /api/clases?page=1&id_nivel=2&id_instructor=5 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of classes with nivel and instructor
POST /api/clases with valid nombre_clase, id_nivel, id_instructor, and cupo -> Receive 201 with created class
PUT /api/clases/{id} with valid updates -> Receive 200 with updated class
DELETE /api/clases/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/clases with invalid cupo or missing related ids -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/clases with Bearer token but invalid pagination filters -> Receive 200 with filtered results or empty set
PUT /api/clases/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Enrollment Management
features.description: Permite registrar y administrar inscripciones de estudiantes en clases con estados como Activo, Suspendido o Baja.
user_flows: GET /api/inscripciones?estado=Activo&page=1 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of enrollments with estudiante and clase
POST /api/inscripciones with valid id_estudiante and id_clase -> Receive 201 with created enrollment
PUT /api/inscripciones/{id} with status change to Suspendido -> Receive 200 with updated enrollment
DELETE /api/inscripciones/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/inscripciones with missing or invalid student/class ids -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/inscripciones?estado=Invalido with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with empty or filtered results according to backend rules
PUT /api/inscripciones/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Permite registrar y consultar pagos asociados a inscripciones activas, filtrando por estado.
user_flows: GET /api/pagos?estado=Pagado&page=1 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of payments with inscripcion.estudiante
POST /api/pagos with valid id_inscripcion, monto, metodo_pago, and optional estado -> Receive 201 with created payment
DELETE /api/pagos/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/pagos with monto below minimum or invalid metodo_pago -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/pagos with Bearer token and estado=Pendiente -> Receive 200 filtered payment list
DELETE /api/pagos/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Attendance Management
features.description: Permite registrar, listar y eliminar asistencias vinculadas a inscripciones activas y fechas de clase.
user_flows: GET /api/asistencias?fecha_clase=2026-06-01&page=1 with Bearer token -> Receive 200 paginated list of attendance records with inscripcion
POST /api/asistencias with valid id_inscripcion, fecha_clase, and asistio -> Receive 201 with created attendance record
DELETE /api/asistencias/{id} with Bearer token -> Receive 200 confirming deletion
POST /api/asistencias with missing fecha_clase or invalid asistio value -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/asistencias with Bearer token and no fecha filter -> Receive 200 paginated attendance list
DELETE /api/asistencias/{id} with non-existent id -> Receive 404 not found

tech_stack.other: Laravel Sanctum (token auth), Eloquent ORM, Form Requests

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login and logout using Laravel Sanctum Bearer tokens

endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return Bearer token

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Returns aggregate counts for dashboard cards

endpoints.description: Get total counts of students, instructors, classes, active enrollments

response_schema.200: {estudiantes: int, instructores: int, clases: int, inscripciones_activas: int}

endpoints.description: List students with search and pagination
Delete student and cascade delete related inscripciones, pagos, asistencias
List instructors with search and pagination
List all levels (no pagination, returns array)
List classes with nivel and instructor, pagination
List enrollments with student and class, filter by estado
List payments with enrollment info, filter by estado
List attendance records with enrollment info, filter by date
